items.name: Black Safe Life Defense Vest
items.description:
Safe Life Defense Patrol Vests are used by many officers around the country. They provide a lightweight experience with heavy protection. 

UGC Creators are free to make accessories for these vests (patches, badges, etc.) but are not allowed to re-upload my assets. A DMCA Takedown Request will be issued to anyone who steals my assets.

We have various colors on our group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/35949141/Boys-in-Blue-Co
